Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James P. Diwik, Esq. appeared for pliantiff Old Republic General Insurance Corporation.
No appearance by defendants Aerosea Corporation, a California corporation or Dennis Zen Keong Ho, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on October 20, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Virginia M. Wong was filed on April 9, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Old Republic General Insurance Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Aerosea Corporation, a California corporation, and Dennis Zen Keong Ho, an individual, as follows:

As to Defendant Aerosea Corporation:

Damages/Principal - $17,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,102.00.
Attorney's Fees - $11,542.00.
Costs - $1,732.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,379.00.

As to Defendant Dennis Zen Keong Ho:

Damages/Principal - $32,958.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than November 17, 2009.
